reviews.comment:
La empleada de full muy prepotente, no pude saber su nombre, parecía ser encargada. Fui con mi suegra de 80 años que apenas puede caminar a merendar y de mala manera nos exigió que no podíamos permanecer en el lugar por que no tenía pase sanitario ya que el geriátrico no nos dió dicho pase y nos ofreció el patio que no tiene techo y estaba lloviendo. Fuimos a la Shell que está a una cuadra y no tuvimos problemas.

(Translated by Google)
The employee at Full was very arrogant; I couldn't get her name, but she seemed to be the manager. I went with my 80-year-old mother-in-law, who can barely walk, to have a snack, and she rudely demanded that we couldn't stay because she didn't have a health pass, as the nursing home hadn't given us one. She offered us the patio, which has no roof, and it was raining. We went to the Shell station a block away and had no problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXaHFMY2RnEAE
